prompts.prompt: Create a Holiday Planner module to manage upcoming trips, travellers, booking dates, budgets, suppliers, and notes. Call it Holiday Planner.
Build a Customer Site Assets module so we can track equipment installed at each customer site, serial numbers, warranty dates, service history, and photos.
Create a Warranty Claims module for faulty products, claim dates, supplier responses, replacement status, and customer updates.
Create a Job Hazard Analysis module to record hazards, controls, responsible people, review dates, and signoff before work starts.
Make an Employee Onboarding module with start date, manager, equipment checklist, training steps, payroll status, and notes.
Create a Fleet Defects module to log vehicle defects, severity, reported by, due date, workshop booking, and resolution notes.
Create a Tool Calibration module for calibration dates, next due date, certificate uploads, vendor, and status.
Create a Service Agreements module to track contract start and end dates, renewal terms, pricing, service level, and account owner.
Build a Rental Checklists module for pre-hire checks, return inspections, damages, photos, and signoff.
Create a Room Turnovers module to manage checkout cleanups, assigned staff, inspection status, linen issues, and ready-for-next-guest time.
Create a Vendor Compliance module for insurance expiry, safety docs, onboarding status, approved categories, and review notes.
Create an Incident Investigations module with incident link, investigator, root cause, corrective actions, due dates, and closure signoff.
In Contacts, add a Contacted status and give staff a Set: Contacted action button so they can move leads forward properly.
In Jobs, add an On Hold status with Resume and Set: On Hold actions so the team can pause work cleanly.
For Purchase Requests, add Pending Approval, Approved, and Rejected statuses, plus action buttons for managers to approve or reject with comments.
In Leave Requests, add action buttons for Approve and Decline, and make manager notes required when a request is declined.
In Maintenance, add an Awaiting Parts status with a Set: Awaiting Parts action and a Resume Work action.
In Equipment Hire, add Picked Up and Returned statuses and make the action buttons obvious for the hire desk.
In Safety Incidents, add Investigation Open and Investigation Closed statuses with matching actions for the H&S team.
In Vendor Reviews, add Review Due and Reviewed statuses so procurement can track follow-up properly.
In Contacts, add an attachment field on the Master tab labeled Floor plans.
In Jobs, if the job type is Emergency, show After Hours Contact and Callout Reason fields and make them required.
Add an Internal Margin field to Quotes, keep it visible on the form for staff, but make sure it never appears on customer-facing documents.
In Equipment Hire, add a Bond Paid checkbox and a Bond Receipt attachment field that only shows when Bond Paid is ticked.
In Client Onboarding, if the client type is Enterprise, show a Compliance Documents attachment field and make it required before approval.
In Site Visits, add a Site Access Notes field and put it near the address and contact details so technicians see it early.
Add a Service Region field to Contacts and show it on both the form and the list view.
In Service Agreements, add a Renewal Reminder Date field and place it with the contract dates and renewal terms.
When a Quote is approved, automatically create a Job, copy the customer and site details across, and notify the coordinator.
Set up an automation so overdue invoices send a reminder email 7 days after due date and a second reminder 14 days after due date.
When a Leave Request is approved, notify the employee, their manager, and the rostering team automatically.
When stock drops below the minimum level, create a Purchase Request automatically and alert the purchasing admin.
If a Safety Incident is logged as high severity, immediately notify the H&S manager and create a follow-up investigation task.
When a Job is completed, send the customer a feedback request email the next morning with the technician and service details filled in.
When a Service Agreement is within 30 days of expiry, create a renewal follow-up task and notify the account owner.
If a Contractor Induction is due to expire within 14 days, email the contractor and the site admin automatically.
Create a Service Report PDF template that includes customer details, work performed, technician notes, photos, and customer signoff.
Create a quote approval email template that thanks the customer, shows the approved quote number, and explains the next steps.
Create a welcome email template for new clients with their account manager details, support hours, and onboarding checklist link.
Create a polite overdue invoice reminder email template with invoice number, amount due, due date, and payment options.
Create a rental handover PDF with customer details, item list, condition checklist, damages, and signatures.
Create an induction completion certificate PDF showing contractor name, company, site, completion date, and expiry date.
Create a maintenance visit summary email template with job summary, findings, recommended actions, and attached service report.
Create a Holiday Itinerary PDF template with traveller details, travel dates, bookings, flights, hotels, and activity notes.
Set up Xero sync so approved Contacts and Invoices can be sent across, but only when the accounting fields are complete.
Connect Site Visits to Google Calendar so confirmed visits create calendar events with the customer, site address, and assigned staff.
Set up Twilio SMS so technicians get a text when a Job is dispatched with job number, site, and booking window.
Sync marketing opt-in Contacts to Mailchimp, but only include customers who have consented to newsletters.
Post to Slack when a quote over $10,000 is approved, including the customer name, quote number, and salesperson.
Send a webhook to Zapier when a new customer onboarding is marked complete so downstream systems can be updated.
Build a Jobs dashboard showing jobs by status, jobs by technician, overdue jobs, and completed jobs this week.

Improve the Construction operations dashboard so supervisors can see workers on site today, total labour hours today, materials logged today, total cost today, cost breakdown, recent time entries, and today’s material logs.
Create a sales dashboard for leads, quotes sent, quotes won, lost reasons, and conversion rate by salesperson.
Create an overdue invoices dashboard with aging buckets, total overdue amount, and top overdue customers.
Build a maintenance compliance dashboard showing upcoming services, overdue equipment, and technician completion rates.
Create a staff training dashboard that highlights expired certificates, upcoming renewals, and completion by team.
Build a full customer onboarding flow across Contacts, Tasks, Documents, and email automation so new clients get set up consistently.
When a field service job is completed, capture technician notes, generate a service report PDF, and email it to the customer automatically.
Create a supplier onboarding process across Contacts, Purchase Requests, and Vendor Compliance so new vendors cannot be used until documents are approved.
Set up a project handover process that links Sales, Jobs, Calendar, and Documents so operations has everything before work starts.

Plan a minimal internal time tracking and invoicing suite that reuses Contacts, adds only Work Management and Billing, avoids kernel timer infrastructure, tracks billable time with normal records, creates invoices from billable time, and generates invoice PDFs.

Create a Vendor Approvals app called Vendor Approvals with a lifecycle for draft, approved, and rejected vendors, make Review Notes required when the record is rejected, show Contract End Date only for approved vendors, and include a draft approval notification automation.
Build a property inspection flow across Contacts, Site Visits, Documents, and Maintenance so inspections, photos, defects, and follow-up work all stay linked.
Plan a contractor compliance rollout that reuses Contacts, adds Compliance and Renewals, sends expiry reminders automatically, and generates an approval pack PDF. Show the phased plan first.
